name: Cashew Shogi
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Cashew Shogi: H. G. Muller's 'demagnified Dai Dai Shogi' -- a 13x13 large-shogi variant, 54 pieces a side of 35 types (2 more via promotion), DROP-LESS. Win by CAPTURING the enemy King. Keeps Dai Dai's flavour: the Lion double-steps, the Wolf (Lion Dog) makes up to three king-steps along a ray annihilating everything it passes, the Goblin is a bent Bishop and the Hook Mover a bent Rook (both reach anywhere in two legs), and the flanking Generals, Guards and Chariots move asymmetrically. Promotion is by CAPTURE only -- a promotable piece that captures MUST promote (there is no promotion zone). No drops.
